Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter Bales, Esq. of Buchalter Nemer, Tel. 415.227.0900, for Plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF EAST WEST BANK'S Application For Right To Attach Order and For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Granted because no opposition was filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
